# ICRISAT District Level Database (DLD) — apportioned district crop yields
Source: ICRISAT DLD (data.icrisat.org), cleaned mirror via Figshare article 19615764 ("District-Level Dataset cleaned"), file dld_yield_complete.csv (https://ndownloader.figshare.com/files/34844304).
Coverage: 311 districts, 20 major-agriculture states, 1966–2017. Area (1000 ha), Production (1000 t), Yield (kg/ha) for ~20 crops. Missing values coded -1.
Apportioned to 1966 district boundaries for time-consistency. Downloaded 2026-06-06.
